# American Impact Review

> American Impact Review (AIR) is a peer-reviewed, open-access, multidisciplinary academic journal published by Global Talent Foundation Inc., a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization based in the United States.

## Key Facts

- Full name: American Impact Review
- Abbreviation: Am. Impact Rev.
- Publisher: Global Talent Foundation Inc. (501(c)(3) nonprofit)
- Website: https://americanimpactreview.com
- DOI prefix: 10.66308 (active Crossref member)
- ISSN: application submitted to Library of Congress
- License: CC BY 4.0 (open access)
- Language: English
- Publication model: Continuous (rolling) publication
- Peer review: Double-blind
- Article Processing Charges: None (no fees for authors)

## Scope

The journal publishes original research articles, systematic reviews, and applied case studies across disciplines including:
- Computer Science and Software Engineering
- Health Sciences and Biotechnology
- Artificial Intelligence and Data Science
- Sports Science and Human Performance
- Energy and Climate Technology
- Engineering and Robotics
- Social Sciences and Public Policy
- Business and Marketing
- Art and Design

## DOI Registration

All published articles receive permanent Digital Object Identifiers (DOIs) through Crossref. DOI prefix: 10.66308. Example: https://doi.org/10.66308/air.e2026001

## Contact

- Editorial inquiries: editor@americanimpactreview.com
- Submissions: https://americanimpactreview.com/submit
- Browse articles: https://americanimpactreview.com/explore

## Editorial Board

The journal maintains an international editorial board of researchers with published records in peer-reviewed venues. See: https://americanimpactreview.com/editorial-board
